error.source_today_required: A today entity is required for each configured source.

user.title: PV Forecast Fusion
user.description: Choose a name and how many forecast sources you want to combine. The sources are configured one by one in the next steps.

data_description.source_count: Configure between one and three sources. Each selected source gets its own guided setup step.

reconfigure.title: Update PV Forecast Fusion
reconfigure.description: Run the guided setup again for this existing entry. You can rename it, add another forecast source, or remove an existing one by lowering the source count.

data_description.source_count: Choose how many sources this entry should keep after saving. Lowering the number removes the extra source slots from the stored configuration.

source_1.title: Configure source 1
source_1.description: Set up the first forecast source. The today entity is required; tomorrow and remaining-today can usually stay empty when auto-detection can infer them.

data_description.source_name: Optional label used in diagnostics and fused-source explanations.
data_description.source_type: Use auto in most cases. Force a provider type only when preset detection picks the wrong mapping.
data_description.source_today_entity: Required. Pick one or more sensor entities with the entity picker. Multiple selected sensors are stored internally as a source group.
data_description.source_tomorrow_entity: Optional. Pick a matching tomorrow entity when you want to override auto-detection.
data_description.source_tomorrow_entity_csv: Only needed for advanced multi-array mappings with intentional gaps. Example: sensor.a_tomorrow, , sensor.c_tomorrow
data_description.source_remaining_entity: Optional. Pick a matching remaining-today entity when you want to override auto-detection.
data_description.source_remaining_entity_csv: Only needed for advanced multi-array mappings with intentional gaps. Example: sensor.a_remaining, , sensor.c_remaining
data_description.source_influence: How strongly this source should affect the fused result. Slider range: 0 to 2. It replaces the old separate weight and confidence values.
data_description.source_adjustment_percent: Manual correction in percent. Slider range: -100% to +100%. Example: -10 lowers this source by 10%, +15 raises it by 15%.

source_2.title: Configure source 2
source_2.description: Set up the second forecast source. Use the same entity rules as for source 1.

source_3.description: Set up the third forecast source. Use the same entity rules as for source 1.
